task_name: 社会模拟低信息量意图抽取
intent_policy: This task is for exploratory social simulation before the author has a detailed writing plan.
Keep the output schema minimal; do not add writing_intent, seed entities, retrieval needs, query plans, simulation plans, scene beats, or answer hints as separate fields.
Keep only anchors needed to define the exploration space, such as central characters, broad location, occasion, important object or vehicle, or immediate situation.
Prefer an open-ended setup over a target outcome.
Make this artifact less informative than the normal writing_intent.
Avoid full synopsis, exact dialogue, exact action choreography, required endings, detailed emotional turns, evidence spans, retrieval instructions, and generation instructions.
The output must be parseable JSON.
